narrative_beat: Medium dois irmãos de costas em manto vendo rostos fantasmáticos em parede P&B

style_reference.textual_description: dark cinematic chiaroscuro, Caravaggio-inspired, foreground in rich warm tones (crimson, amber, gold) with background in desaturated black-and-white, film grain, candlelight, floating orange embers

subject.primary: a medium shot of two siblings seen from behind standing side by side, wearing renaissance robes in crimson and gold
subject.focal_point: the wall ahead where ghostly desaturated faces of researchers are projected
subject.secondary: The siblings gaze at the wall of faces; warm lateral light falls on their shoulders.
props: renaissance robes in crimson and gold
wall of desaturated ghost researcher faces

environment.location: a great hall with tall stone walls

composition.foreground: siblings in rich crimson and gold
composition.midground: stone floor between them and wall
composition.background: desaturated black-and-white wall with ghost faces

style.post_processing: halation, crushed blacks, amber highlights, anamorphic lens flares
style.texture_detail: 35mm film grain, dust particles, floating orange embers

symbolism.secondary: ghost faces as colleagues left behind

negative_as_positive: clean frame without visible text or watermarks
photorealistic documentary cinematography, not illustrated or cartoon
analog film photography aesthetic, no digital art flatness
muted desaturated background palette, warm saturated foreground only

multimodal_inputs.instruction: Transfer color palette, lighting, grain, atmosphere only. Do not copy composition.
